name: init and accumulate
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, ItemAdded: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: access event data
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { total: 0 }; }, Deposited: function(s, e) { s.total += e.data.amount; return s; } })

name: access nested event data
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { name: '' }; }, UserUpdated: function(s, e) { s.name = e.data.user.name; return s; } })

name: unhandled events ignored
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Wanted: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: $any catches all events
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, $any: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: named handler takes priority over $any
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { specific: 0, other: 0 }; }, Specific: function(s, e) { s.specific++; return s; }, $any: function(s, e) { s.other++; return s; } })

name: foreachStream partitioning
source: fromCategory("cart").foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { items: 0 }; }, ItemAdded: function(s, e) { s.items++; return s; } })

name: partitionBy custom key
source: fromAll().partitionBy(function(e) { return e.data.region; }).when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Event: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: set and restore state
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: set and restore partitioned state
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: biState with shared state
source: options({ biState: true }); fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, $initShared: function() { return { total: 0 }; }, Added: function(s, e) { s[0].count++; s[1].total += e.data.amount; return s; } })

name: state with nested objects
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { users: {}, count: 0 }; }, UserCreated: function(s, e) { s.users[e.data.id] = { name: e.data.name }; s.count++; return s; } })

name: state with arrays
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { items: [] }; }, Added: function(s, e) { s.items.push(e.data.item); return s; } })

name: unknown partition returns null
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } })

name: event metadata accessible
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { correlation: '' }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.correlation = e.metadata.correlationId; return s; } })

name: event streamId accessible
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { stream: '' }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.stream = e.streamId; return s; } })

name: event sequenceNumber accessible
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { seq: -1 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.seq = e.sequenceNumber; return s; } })

name: event eventType accessible
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { type: '' }; }, $any: function(s, e) { s.type = e.eventType; return s; } })

name: event isJson accessible
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { json: false }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.json = e.isJson; return s; } })

name: unicode in event data
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { name: '' }; }, Named: function(s, e) { s.name = e.data.name; return s; } })

name: special characters in stream names
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return { seen: true }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } })

name: empty data object
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } })

name: events from multiple streams to same projection
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { streams: {} }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.streams[e.streamId] = (s.streams[e.streamId] || 0) + 1; return s; } })
